orchestrator.description: Master task delegator — always start here for new features

code-reviewer.description: Reviews all code for AdWheels conventions and bugs

debugger.description: Diagnoses and fixes bugs across the full stack

test-writer.description: Writes Jest and Vitest tests for critical paths

security-auditor.description: Audits auth, payments, RLS, and secrets before pushes

ui-ux-designer.description: Designs frontend UI enforcing AdWheels design system
